description:
🕒 10:00–16:30

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Come experience the Seibu Train Festival 2026 at Musashioka Vehicle Maintenance Depot (武蔵丘車両検修場).

Highlights include:
• First public showing of the 7000 series train
• Ride the traverser (train turntable)
• Mini train rides (200 yen)
• Train driving simulator
• 52-seat comfort display
• Food trucks
• Picnic area open to the public

Admission is free. The event will proceed rain or shine, but will be cancelled in case of severe weather. Last entry at 3:00 PM.
location: 武蔵丘車両検修場 (日高市台462-1、西武池袋線「高麗駅」徒歩約15分)
summary: Seibu Train Festival 2026 at Musashioka Vehicle Maintenance Depot
